title: Cholavandān Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Cholavandān, with a Z-Score of +4.63. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level, scoring 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Cholavandān is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 15.2 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 53%, and the wind speed is 2.3 km/h, making the conditions even more unbearable. 
 The city is experiencing no heating degree days, with an HDD of 0.0 GG, emphasizing the intense heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately due to the critical heat wave conditions.
